message:
feat: dedicated test Dolt server on port 3308 to eliminate zombie servers

Daemon now manages a shared test Dolt server (port 3308) so all `go test`
invocations reuse it instead of spawning per-test servers that survive as
zombies. Includes health check ticker, heartbeat integration, graceful
shutdown, and multi-port zombie detection in Doctor Dog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -118,6 +118,7 @@ type PatrolsConfig struct {
 	Deacon         *PatrolConfig          `json:"deacon,omitempty"`
 	Handler        *PatrolConfig          `json:"handler,omitempty"`
 	DoltServer     *DoltServerConfig      `json:"dolt_server,omitempty"`
+	DoltTestServer *DoltServerConfig      `json:"dolt_test_server,omitempty"`
 	DoltRemotes    *DoltRemotesConfig     `json:"dolt_remotes,omitempty"`
 	DoltBackup     *DoltBackupConfig      `json:"dolt_backup,omitempty"`
 	JsonlGitBackup *JsonlGitBackupConfig  `json:"jsonl_git_backup,omitempty"`
